title: Species Sensitivity Distribution Data
text: ssddata R package Species Sensitivity Distribution (SSD) benchmark datasets can serve reference standard testing evaluation SSD methodologies. package includes range data sets sourced Canadian Council Ministers Environment (ccme), Australian Institute Marine Science (aims), Commonwealth Scientific Industrial Research Organisation (csiro), Australian New Zealand water water quality guideline website (angz), well anonymous datasets supplied various parties (anon). source dataset indicated using pre-fix data name (e.g. ccme, aims, etc), actual chemical name following (e.g. ccme_boron). package also includes wqbench_data, large data set US EPA ECOTOX database, cleaned standardized wqbench package. Please see relevant reference page info information dataset. can browse source code github. Top report error, request features data additions please post github issues page.

title: Get SSD dataset — get_ssddata
text: Retrieves specific SSD dataset, filtering groups species applies geometric mean case duplicate records.

title: Get SSD dataset — get_ssddata
code: get_ssddata(   dataset_name,   filter_val = NULL,   use_gmmean = TRUE,   spp_vec = c("Species", "Genus"),   conc = "Conc" )

title: Get SSD dataset — get_ssddata
text: dataset_name name (chr) desired dataset ssddata. filter_val character string, indicating filter applied (value) (colname) column applies , separated "_". Must form colname_value. use_gmmean Logical indicating geometric mean applied. spp_vec group_by columns use grouping data applying geometric mean. conc name concentration (x data) column.

title: Get SSD dataset — get_ssddata
text: data.frame dataset_name applied groupings summary.
